high.definition: Patterns that never contain first-party source and are safe to exclude from the code graph without prompting.

medium.definition: Generated build output that is usually safe to exclude but can shadow real source symbols; requires confirm.

patterns.rationale: Compiled build output mirrors source symbols.
false_positive_examples: a project whose hand-written sources live under a dist/ directory

low.definition: Patterns that may include hand-maintained code; excluded only with explicit opt-in.

patterns.rationale: Minified bundles are usually generated but are occasionally vendored source.
false_positive_examples: a vendored library shipped only in minified form
